content:
🚀 This iteration finalizes how the Fallen Angel fits within the archetypes, redefines betrayal trials based on moral alignment, and establishes a hybrid system for real-world influence visibility.

📜 1. The Fallen Angel – Does It Still Fit?

📜 Reevaluating whether the Fallen Angel aligns with the other archetypes or needs reclassification.

✔ Current Issue:
• Other archetypes define a player’s core identity from the start.
• Fallen Angel is now a transformation, not an archetype.
• It’s the only “pathway” that unlocks mid-game rather than at selection.

✔ Possible Solutions:
1️⃣ Keep It as a Transformative Path
• If a player betrays their faction multiple times or falls into exile, they unlock the Fallen Angel transformation.
• Pros: Fits into existing betrayal & faction mechanics.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 476 (chunk 476/555)
